items.title: Minhajul set to become BCB director unopposed from Chattogram
items.summary: A long-time BCB official and former chief selector, Minhajul Abedin is set for a new role as board director

items.title: 'Options' for Green's 2027 ODI World Cup role, David unavailable but selectors hopeful
items.summary: Australia coach Andrew McDonald keen to trial Green in some different roles in Pakistan and Bangladesh in a bid to find finishing power after Maxwell's ODI retirement

items.title: Bangladesh to tour Zimbabwe for all-format series in June-July
items.summary: Upcoming series will mark Zimbabwe's first home assignment this year, and their first international action since the T20 World Cup
